instructions: Start the server with valid env vars (POSTGRES_URL, DRAGONFLY_URL, OPENROUTER_API_KEY). Connect a Socket.IO client to the server and exercise the auth handshake, room join, and reconnect flows.
acceptance: Socket.IO client connects successfully without a sessionToken (new connection for lobby creation)
Socket.IO client connects with a valid sessionToken and is auto-joined to the correct game:{gameId} room
Socket.IO client connecting with an invalid sessionToken receives an error event and is disconnected
Server sends ping frames at the configured interval and client receives pong response
lobby:create event with valid payload returns lobby:created response with roomCode, gameId, playerId, sessionToken
lobby:join event with valid payload returns lobby:joined response and emits lobby:player_joined to the room
game:message event without auth (no sessionToken) is rejected with an error
Disconnecting a player emits game:opponent_disconnected to the room with a reconnectDeadline
Reconnecting with the same sessionToken within 30s emits game:opponent_reconnected to the room and preserves room membership
All event payloads that fail Zod validation are rejected with an error event containing code and message
